vocab.example: My circadian rhythm is naturally geared towards the morning, making me feel incredibly productive at the crack of dawn.

vocab.meaning: sự sắc bén về trí tuệ, sự minh mẫn
vocab.example: I’ve noticed that my mental acuity tends to wane as the day progresses, so I prioritize difficult tasks for the AM.

vocab.meaning: sự uể oải sau khi ăn trưa
vocab.example: Studying in the afternoon is a struggle for me due to the inevitable post-lunch slump that clouds my concentration.
To achieve peak performance, I usually schedule my most intensive research sessions for the late afternoon.
Being an early bird, I find that I can accomplish more in two hours before breakfast than in an entire afternoon.

vocab.meaning: dễ tiếp thu, sẵn sàng đón nhận (kiến thức)
vocab.example: My brain seems much more receptive to complex mathematical concepts during the quietude of the morning.

vocab.meaning: người hay thức khuya (thường thích làm việc muộn)
vocab.example: I'm definitely not a night owl, so by the time the afternoon rolls around, my energy levels are already depleted.

vocab.meaning: có lợi cho, tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: The vibrant atmosphere of the afternoon is actually quite conducive to creative brainstorming sessions.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu vào guồng, làm việc trôi chảy
vocab.example: I don't really hit my stride until after 2 PM, which is why I save my essay writing for the afternoon.

vocab.meaning: hôn trầm, lờ đờ, thiếu sức sống
vocab.example: I often feel quite lethargic in the morning, requiring several cups of coffee before I can even look at a textbook.
